headline: Intel earnings, American Airlines, mortgage rates: What to Watch
summary: Asking for a Trend Host Josh Lipton previews several of the biggest stories to come tomorrow, Thursday, April 23, including earnings results from American Express (AXP), Intel (INTC), and American Airlines (AAL), alongside the latest reading on US mortgage rates.

headline: Could Comcast’s Broader StreamSaver Bundles Reshape Its Convergence Story and Valuation Lens (CMCSA)?
summary: In recent weeks, Comcast has expanded its Xfinity and Comcast Business broadband footprint in Central Florida and Missouri, broadened its StreamSaver streaming bundles to include more major services, and prepared to report earnings with market expectations for higher revenue growth versus the prior year’s flat performance. These moves highlight Comcast’s effort to deepen customer engagement through bundled connectivity and entertainment offerings while continuing to invest in higher-speed...

headline: Comcast Stock Is in a Slump. Earnings Must Show Its Subscriber Exodus Is Slowing.
summary: Shares are down 10% over the 12 months through Wednesday’s close, dragged down by broadband subscriber losses.

headline: Xfinity Mobile Launches Mobile Plus and Mobile Select, Redefining Premium Wireless With Lifetime Device Protection Included
summary: PHILADELPHIA, April 22, 2026--Xfinity Mobile today launched Mobile Plus and Mobile Select, two new wireless plans designed to give customers premium features without the premium price, hidden fees or trade-offs. As part of Xfinity Mobile's most significant product expansion to date, for the first time, customers on the Mobile Plus plan can get Lifetime Device Protection, Device Upgrades anytime, and Global Travel Pass included in one simple plan.
